ops.title: semsearch: ANN index for large-repo query latency
ops.description: The native semantic-search leg is a linear cosine scan over all chunk vectors; per-query cost scales with chunk count. Aggregate p50 (1.384ms) beats semble and passes the gate, but 6 large repos exceed the per-repo 3.556ms bar (zig 26k chunks=12.5ms, abseil-cpp 16k=7ms, redis 12k=4.7ms, laravel 11.6k=4.7ms, newtonsoft-json 4.3k=5.7ms, jackson-databind 9k=3.7ms). semble's Vicinity scales the same way. Add an approximate-nearest-neighbor index (coder/hnsw, landscape note 85b7ab1) for large corpora, keeping linear scan for small ones. User-approved follow-up 2026-07-22.

ops.text: Large-repo (>=10k chunks) query p50 under the 3.556ms per-repo bar with NDCG unchanged
